title: Free AI Indicator Predicting Price Direction (All Asset Classes) – No Sales, Just Sharing
author: Unusual_Pirate_2727
selftext:
Hey everyone,

I wanted to share something I’ve been testing lately — it’s a **free AI-based indicator** that predicts price direction across multiple asset classes (stocks, crypto, forex, indices, commodities, etc.).

Before anyone asks — **there’s nothing to buy, no course, no affiliate links, no paid group.** I’m genuinely just sharing it because I found it useful and figured others here might want to experiment with it too.

What it does:

* Uses AI modeling to forecast short-term price direction
* Works across different markets
* Gives clear directional bias (bullish/bearish)
* Can be used standalone or alongside your current strategy

I’ve been forward testing it and was honestly surprised by how consistent it’s been at identifying directional moves. Obviously no indicator is magic and risk management still matters, but it’s been a solid tool for confirmation and bias.

Here’s a video showing:

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kJsrntNWV\_s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kJsrntNWV_s)  


* How it works
* How to set it up
* Performance examples across different markets
* Trade breakdowns

(Video link here)

Again, not selling anything. Just helping out the community.

If anyone else tests it, I’d love to hear your experience or see how you’re integrating it into your strategy.

Hope it helps someone 👍
